source_jobs.title: Founding Creative (content & video)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT VIBIZ

We're building Vibiz.ai http://Vibiz.ai, the first Vibe Business Platform. We're VC-backed, have hundreds of paying customers, and we're building an AI agent that autonomously runs and grows businesses - spending budget, making decisions, executing actions, and driving real results.



THE ROLE

We're looking for a Founding Creative (content & videos) - the person who will define the visual storytelling of Vibiz. You shoot, edit, animate, and ship content that makes people stop scrolling. You have taste. You know what a cinematic product launch looks like. You know how to make a 60-second video feel like a movie trailer. This isn't a systems role - this is a craft role. You make beautiful things, fast.



YOUR WORK WILL BE A SUCCESS IF

 - The best talent in the world wants to join Vibiz because our content made them feel something

 - People discover us through a video, not an ad

 - "How do you make your content?" becomes the most common question we get

 - Our storytelling is our growth engine - it doesn't just build brand, it drives revenue


WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Create cinematic product launch videos - every feature we ship deserves a video that makes people want to try it immediately

 - Produce weekly content that shows who we are - the product, the team, the energy, the vision

 - Launch and edit long-form content (podcasts, interviews, deep dives) into short-form clips that hit on every platform

 - Build the visual language of Vibiz across video - what we look and feel like in motion

 - Shoot and produce team content - the behind-the-scenes, the building-in-public moments, the raw energy of an early-stage startup

 - Create social-first content designed to perform on X, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

 - Use AI tools to move faster - generate assets, iterate on ideas, accelerate your production workflow

 - Build and lead a build-in-public content series documenting the Vibiz journey

 - Create a signature visual style that becomes synonymous with the Vibiz brand

 - Produce documentary-style content capturing the day-to-day energy of the team

 - Work directly with founders - zero layers, zero approval chains

 - Help define the creative culture from day one


STACK VIBES

This is a new kind of creative role. We can't afford one polished piece a month. We need someone who integrates AI deeply into their creative process - not just to go faster, but to push the creative boundaries of what's possible. AI should make your work more beautiful, more ambitious, and more prolific. Use Runway, Kling, Sora, Midjourney, whatever is cutting-edge tomorrow - we expect you to be at the frontier of what AI can do for visual storytelling.



YOU ARE

 - A creative with taste - you make things that look beautiful and feel alive

 - A maker, not a manager - you shoot, edit, animate, and deliver

 - Someone who sets the vibe - you don't just execute a brief, you define how things should look and feel

 - Fast - you can turn around a polished video in days, not weeks

 - Comfortable with chaos - there's no creative brief template, just a product to make look incredible

 - AI-augmented - you use AI to move faster, generate ideas, and prototype visuals

 - Builder > employee

 - Taste > process

 - Speed > perfection

 - Impact > title


HARD REQUIREMENTS

If any of these is a no - don't apply.

 - You have a portfolio or reel that shows genuinely beautiful work - not just functional, beautiful

 - You can shoot, edit, and deliver a cinematic video end-to-end by yourself

 - You use AI tools to accelerate your creative workflow (Runway, Midjourney, or similar)

 - You have a feel for what makes content go viral - you've studied it, you've done it, or both

 - You are willing to relocate in a reasonable time (mandatory for full-time)

 - You can show real work: your reel, your numbers, content you've made that moved people or moved metrics


BIG ADD-ONS (NICE TO HAVE)

 - Active on X, YouTube, and Instagram,

source_jobs.title: Founding AI Full-Stack Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're building Vibiz.ai http://Vibiz.ai, the first Vibe Business Platform. We're VC-backed, have hundreds of paying customers, and we're building an AI agent that autonomously runs and grows businesses - spending budget, making decisions, executing actions, and driving real results.

We're looking for a Founding AI Full-Stack Engineer to join us now and build at insane speed.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Ship. Every single day.

 - Build full-stack features end-to-end (frontend, backend, AI layer)

 - Work deeply with LLMs, multi-agent systems, and AI-native UX

 - Turn user chaos into product clarity

 - Design systems that autonomously run real business operations

 - Fix bugs. A lot of them. Fast.

 - Work directly with founders and users - zero layers

 - Help define the engineering culture from day one


STACK VIBES

 - Next.js

 - TypeScript

 - LLMs / Multi-agent systems

 - Vercel AI SDK

 - Cursor, Claude Code - whatever ships fastest

 - Speed > perfection


YOU ARE

 - An end-to-end builder (frontend + backend + AI)

 - Someone who ships daily and doesn't wait for permission

 - Deep into GenAI - you use AI tools to build faster and better

 - Comfortable with chaos, speed, and no spec

 - Product-minded - you think in outcomes, not tickets

 - Builder > employee

 - Speed > comfort

 - Impact > title


HARD REQUIREMENTS

 - You use AI dev tools daily (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, etc.)

 - You genuinely believe GenAI is changing how software is built

 - You can build full-stack apps in TypeScript + Next.js

 - You've worked with LLMs and/or multi-agent systems

 - You live within 1 hour of Milan or are ready to relocate (mandatory)

 - You can show real work: GitHub, side projects, shipped products


BIG ADD-ONS (NICE TO HAVE)

 - Active on X / Twitter, sharing what you build

 - Experience building AI agents or autonomous systems

 - Worked on AI-driven marketing, growth, or distribution tools

 - Built and shipped your own product

 - Previous early-stage startup experience


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Above-average salary for the Italian market

 - Stock options - you're a founder, not just an employee

 - Massive growth opportunity in a fast-scaling startup

 - Small & young team (U25) moving at startup speed

 - Direct access to founders and real ownership


WHAT THIS IS NOT

 - Not a chill corporate job

 - Not async-only remote

 - Not for people who hate ambiguity

 - Not for people who think AI is overhyped

 - Not for people who don't ship

We play padel, ping pong, and tennis. A lot. Bring your rackets.

Show us your repos. Show us what you've built. Show us what you've shipped.
No fancy degree required. We care about your GitHub, not your diploma.

source_jobs.title: Founding Design Engineer
source_jobs.description:
We're building Vibiz.ai http://Vibiz.ai, the first Autonomous Company Platform.

We're VC-backed, have hundreds of paying customers, and we're building an AI agent that autonomously runs and grows businesses - spending budget, making decisions, executing actions, and driving real results.

We're looking for a Founding Design Engineer who has taste, builds beautiful things, thinks analytically when needed, and ships them into production.

Your job is to make the product feel obvious - so that our users can move fast and trust what they see.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Design and build agentic interfaces that feel magical - the AI does the work, the user stays in control

 - Own end-to-end: from concept to Figma to working code in production

 - Ship UI components yourself using Cursor and Claude Code - no waiting for engineering

 - Untangle the confusing parts of the product - audit IA, redesign navigation, restructure flows that lose users. The dashboard, the create-flow, and the workspace shell are live candidates.

 - Define the visual identity, design system, and brand language of a product creating a new category

 - Work directly with founders and engineers - zero handoff, zero layers

 - Know what NOT to ship - sometimes the right answer is "remove this" or "simpler version," not "redesign." Judgment about what's worth building is part of the role.

 - Polish what compounds: empty states, loading skeletons, error states, transitions, hover states, focus states, micro-interactions

 - Own the words inside the product - microcopy, empty-state copy, error messages, onboarding hints, button labels. Words are UX, not decoration.

 - When we decide to ship feature X, you design it, build it, and merge it. You own it through to production.

 - Fix what doesn't work


YOU MIGHT BE THIS PERSON IF

 - You have shipped production UI for a real product used by real users - not portfolio pieces

 - You have an opinion on what good looks like and can defend it without being precious

 - You care about page performance the way most designers care about typography

 - You have specific products you point at and say "I want ours to feel like that"

 - You use Cursor or Claude Code daily and treat AI as core workflow, not novelty

 - You can drop into an unfamiliar codebase, read it, and find the right place to make a change

 - You read session replays, support tickets, and customer calls to sharpen your taste - not to outsource it


YOU PROBABLY ARE NOT THIS PERSON IF

 - Figma is your home and you "also implement a bit"

 - You need design review meetings before pushing

 - You think performance is engineering's problem

 - You think "UX" starts and ends with how it looks

 - You have not shipped to a production app with paying users


HARD REQUIREMENTS

If any of these is a no → don't apply.

 - You can show work that is genuinely beautiful and functional

 - You ship your own designs to production

 - You use AI tools daily as part of your design workflow (non-negotiable)

 - You are open to relocate (mandatory)

 - You can show a real portfolio with shipped products, not just concepts


BIG ADD-ONS (NICE TO HAVE)

 - Active on X / Twitter sharing design work, experiments, or builds

 - Deep knowledge of motion design, spring animations, and interaction physics

 - You know who Rauno, Emil Kowalski, or Paco Coursey are - and why their work matters

 - You've built and shipped your own side projects or products

 - Background in early-stage startups - you've shaped a product from zero


WHAT WE OFFER

 - Above-average salary for the Italian market

 - Stock options - you're a founder, not just an employee

 - Massive growth opportunity in a fast-scaling startup

 - Small & young team (U25) moving at startup speed

 - Direct access to founders and real ownership


WHAT THIS IS NOT

 - Not a pixel-pushing factory - you make design decisions, not just mockups

 - Not a place where designs die in Figma - your designs ship to production, by you

source_jobs.title: AI Builder in Residence
source_jobs.description:
AI is commoditising craft and will soon commoditise taste.

What it can't commoditise is what we deeply, weirdly care about as humans.

We were forced, and still are to a big extent, to find people who do jobs that must be done. But when any job can be done, we are left to ask: what is worth building?

We are entering a new generation of builders who will be more and more similar to artists.

Artists never create what must be created, cause there is nothing that must be created. They create what they want to create as an act of self-expression, and expression is forward-looking.

It makes a statement about what could be https://www.nfx.com/post/infinite-game.

This will give rise to beautiful companies.

The companies that will shape roles around people who deeply care about what others don't even notice will create things that others don't even imagine.

This is already happening.

Stripe launching a book publishing company. A16Z launching a new media division. Early-stage startups launching fellowships and residencies.

If this resonates with you and you feel you want to build something weird with us that only you can see, please apply.
